dataList.name: Sunset Wayfarer's Moth
dataList.desc: - Turn Start: Gain 1 Offense Level Up for every allied unit (including self) in the same faction as self (max 4)

dataList.name: Sunset Wayfarer's Moth
dataList.desc:
- Gain 1 Stack of a random status every turn, chosen from Slash DMG Up, Pierce DMG Up, and Blunt DMG Up. When using an E.G.O Skill of the corresponding Attack Type, deal +50% damage
- On Hit with Unbreakable Coins, deal +20% damage

dataList.name: Sunset Wayfarer's Moth
dataList.desc:
- Turn Start: Gain 1 Offense Level Up for every ally defeated in this Encounter (max 6)
- Combat Start: On A-Reson., Skills that are a part of the A-Reson. chain deal +20% damage

dataList.name: In the Past (Deactivated)
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Past [過去]" Deactivated
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Present (Deactivated)
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Present [現在]" Deactivated
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Future (Deactivated)
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Future [未來]" Deactivated
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Past
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Past [過去]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skills inflict +1 more Burn Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills inflict +2 more Burn Potency and +1 more Burn Count
· 21~30: Final Power +2; Skills inflict +3 more Burn Potency and +2 more Burn Count
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Present
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Present [現在]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skills gain +1 more Poise Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills gain +2 more Poise Potency and +1 more Poise Count
· 21~30: Final Power +2; Skills gain +3 more Poise Potency and +2 more Poise Count
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Future
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Future [未來]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skills inflict +1 more Bleed Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills inflict +2 more Bleed Potency and +1 more Bleed Count
· 21~30: Final Power +2; Skills inflict +3 more Bleed Potency and +2 more Bleed Count
- Max Stack: 30

dataList.name: Temporal Disjunction
dataList.desc:
- Gain 1 Stack every time this unit switches between In the Past / In the Present / In the Future
- Take +(Stack x 15)% damage (max 150%)
- Turn Start: At 10 Stack, gain 5 Fragile
- Max Stack: 10

dataList.name: Flower-burying Pin [埋花針]
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- Gain 1 Offense Level and 1 Defense Level for every 2 Stack
- At 5+ Stack, Final Power +1
- At max Stack, Coin Power +1
- When consuming Flower-burying Pin, give 1 E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity for every Stack consumed

dataList.name: Dragon's Blood [龍血]
dataList.desc:
- Max Potency: 50
- Turn End: Take 1% HP damage per Potency (min 1; cannot be Staggered by this effect)
- Lose 1 Count when using a Defense Skill (once per turn)
- Turn End: Double Potency and lose 1 Count
- This effect can be removed only by reducing Count to 0

dataList.name: Flower-burying Wedge [埋花櫼]
Dragon's Spirit [龍氣]
dataList.desc:
- Take -100% damage
- When hit, expires at Skill End of the Skill that hit

dataList.name: Capricious Mercy
dataList.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +3
- Clash Power +2
- When hit, expires at Skill End of the Skill that hit

dataList.name: Scaleclad
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 20
- Does not expire at 0 Stack
- Lose 1 Stack when taking damage due to Flower-burying Pin
- Take +10% damage for every Stack lost

dataList.name: "It"
dataList.desc:
- Deal -100% damage using Unopposed Attacks
- Take +80% damage from Unopposed Attacks
- All Peccatulum Invidiae units, including this unit, equip only Defense Skills in their Skill Slots
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack

dataList.name: Viewing the Tableau
dataList.desc:
- Base Offense Level -20
- Base Defense Level -20
- Turn Start: Gain 7 Protection if The Ring Apprentice has not retreated from this Encounter
dataList.flavor: "The appreciation of artwork in a gallery calls for unhurried contemplation. Please remember—impatience dulls the appreciation of art."

dataList.name: Suppressed Might
dataList.desc:
- Unopposed Attacks deal -100% damage
- Turn End: If 3+ allies are defeated in this Encounter, this effect expires

dataList.desc: Deal and take +10% damage

dataList.desc: Deal and take +20% damage
